column1: Hey Mason, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Anywhere in Punta Cana that's all inclusive and a good spot where a lot of people are at
yessirrr thats where I'll be too. boutta be lit
How many ppl in your group so far?
Loved “yessirrr thats where I'll be too. boutta be lit”
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
dope which school we from? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
a bunch broo. like a lot lot. major groups off head or like the Bamas, UKentuckys, Tennesse, Arizona, lots of Florida schools - Tampa, USF, UF, FSU etc
gonna be thousands of spring breakers in Punta Cana
Cal is lit tho for sure y'all def know how to party
gonna put this info together for you rn, were you lookin to get things booked today?
Probably not today but definitely soon
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Occidental Punta Cana for sure. but if you are all 21, Riu Republica is pretty dope
Ok sweet I'll look into it
You think we can hop on a call to get all the info when you have a chance?
my bad I missed this bro
yea for sure. I'm around for a call rn if youre avail. also later on today
All good and yea later if u can. Im tryna book from 21-25 with a group of 5 but trying to figure out best deal and where the best spot to be
still thinkin punta tho right, or somethin different now?
okay bet. best deal best spot will be the Occidental Punta Cana. good balance of nice amenities and still a party vibe with other college students
wordd. yea lmk when you want to chat later on
Hey I'm tryna book occidental from the 21st- 25th with a group of 5 how much would that be? I can't find that date for the package on your website
okay bet! for 5 ppl we'll do a room of 3 and a room of 2
if we even out the price for everyone itll be $692.40 per person
we wanna get that locked in?
Yes tryna lock it in all tonight and get all the details first and confirm everything with the boys
word bro what other details we need, I'll make the reservation for you
Just tryna know all the reservation details and what is all included. Also what's the layout of the rooms?
word do you still have the email I sent over? at the top theres a full list of everything included
one I sent a few days back
rooms are two double beds. double beds are in between queen size and full size. there are also two small couches in each room
What's the add on options all about?
the party pass add on is for the hosted events at nightclubs off of the resort property
comes with round trip bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at events we host with Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca Nightclub, and the Booze Cruise event
we have a 3 event bundle for $200 when adding it to your package
Could you email me all the reservation info please?
yea for sure. we ready to lock?
Just had 1 from the group cancel so does that change anything now that it's just 4?
Aight bet all good. It's actually cheaper that way
I'll update that for you in a sec
Is the party package included on that I'm tryna figure out how you add that?
I can add it on. did we want to do the 3 event?
on your account you'll see them individually in the add ons section, but you wont see the 200 bundle
thats just a special deal im able to hook you up with
Yup thats the right spot, but if you're looking for that $200 deal it won't be on there, I can add that manually if you want it
Yea can you add the $200 one please
I got you. Wanna do the Booze Cruise, imagine Cave, and Coco Bongo?
Are those all the options? And what's imagine cave and coco bongo?
so this year the options are coco bongo, imagine cave, Maroca and the booze cruise
coco bongo is one of the biggest clubs/shows in the world, they have one in cabo,cancun , vegas ect.
And imagine cave is probably the coolest club I've ever been to in my life, here is a video of it from last year https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RXvcdVqvARU
Ok bettt can you add coco bongo the booze cruise and imagine cave
Do u have to be 18 to book?
Yea for check in without a guardian gotta be 18
Can someone in the group be a guardian?
Could I give you a call?
On a commute through the evening but I can in the am

Ok all good. We're ready to book just wanna confirm a few things. I just wanted to make sure that we will have two beds in the room for sure and wanted to see if we would have to pay more for the booze cruise because we thought it was included but on site it's says discounted so please let me know! Thanks, Mason
whats up bro! lmk if you wanna hop on call today
rooms have 2 double beds yup. double beds are in between queen size and full size. and the discounted booze cruise is the same booze cruise, I just gave you a bundle discount price for the party pass
yo! I got word Jacob is good to roll on the trip
he just needs to have his parent sign the waiver on his account
We're all dialed in on everything! Appreciate the help and we better see u there!
Word bro! Excited for y'all man let's goooo
Loved “Word bro! Excited for y'all man let's goooo”
yo whenever you got a min, if you could add your flights into your account so we can set up airport transfers
yerr, are Jacob and Mike on the same flight as you?
Yes they are. I also need to edit the flights because we have a layover but I think ronin uploaded ours correctly
what edit did you need to make
It should look exactly like ronins
word so all 4 of you on the same flight
